completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `get_transcript` tool visible in MCP Inspector tool list
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/test_mcp_inspector.py::TestMCPInspectorToolDiscovery::test_get_transcript_visible_in_tool_list which simulates MCP Inspector's tool discovery. The test calls mcp.list_tools() (the same tools/list JSON-RPC method MCP Inspector uses) and asserts: (1) 'get_transcript' is present in the tool list, (2) it has a non-empty description, (3) it has an inputSchema, (4) video_url is in properties, (5) video_url is in required. Test PASSED. Additionally test_get_transcript_has_language_parameter verifies the optional language parameter is present but not required. Both tools are registered at module level in src/__main__.py with @mcp.tool() decorator at lines 43-44 and 143-144.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `list_available_transcripts` tool visible in MCP Inspector tool list
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/test_mcp_inspector.py::TestMCPInspectorToolDiscovery::test_list_available_transcripts_visible_in_tool_list which simulates MCP Inspector's tool discovery. The test calls mcp.list_tools() and asserts: (1) 'list_available_transcripts' is present in the tool list, (2) it has a non-empty description, (3) it has an inputSchema, (4) video_url is in properties, (5) video_url is in required. Test PASSED. Additionally test_exactly_two_tools_registered verifies the tool list contains exactly ['get_transcript', 'list_available_transcripts'] — no extras, none missing.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check src/ tests/' — output: 'All checks passed!'. Fixed 9 ruff errors in turn 1: removed unused imports (subprocess, sys in test_dependency.py; asyncio, MagicMock in test_transcript_tools.py), fixed import sorting (I001 in test_transcript_client.py, unit/test_transcript.py), reformatted 2 lines exceeding 100 chars (E501 in test_transcript_client.py). New test_mcp_inspector.py also passes ruff. Re-verified in turn 2 after linter auto-modifications — still passes.

Ran 'mypy src/' — output: 'Success: no issues found in 5 source files'. No source code changes were needed. pyproject.toml has strict mode enabled ([tool.mypy] strict = true, python_version = '3.10') with ignore_missing_imports for yt_dlp and youtube_transcript_api third-party libraries. All 5 source files (src/__init__.py, src/__main__.py, src/services/__init__.py, src/services/transcript_client.py, src/services/youtube_client.py) pass type checking.
